prestazioni: Ford Cyclone 3.7L V6 (engine code: *Duratec 37*) forced-induction conversion using a *Garrett GTX3582R* turbocharger with a *Tial MV-R 44mm* external wastegate, paired with a *Pectel SQ6M* standalone ECU running custom 4000cc/min *Injector Dynamics ID1050x* injectors and a *Radium Engineering* dual-catch can setup to manage the 1.5-bar boost target for 550whp on *VP Racing Q16* fuel

Full *Ginetta G55-specific* tubular subframe reinforcement by *Custom Cages* with integrated *Ohlins TTX40* 3-way adjustable coilovers (24-position rebound, 22-position compression, and adjustable ride height via threaded perches), paired with *SuperPro* polybushings for the front control arms and *Whiteline* adjustable rear toe arms to eliminate compliance under 1.2G lateral load

Dry-sump oil system conversion using a *Dailey Engineering* 4-stage pump with a *Setrab* 19-row oil cooler and *Mocal* thermostatic sandwich plate, combined with a *Penske* 8760-series 3-way adjustable rear differential mount and *AP Racing* CP8660 front brake calipers with *DBA 5000-series* 2-piece rotors (380mm x 36mm) for fade resistance under 200mph+ braking
estetica: Full *Liberty Walk LB-G55* widebody kit with *custom-molded* carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser, all finished in *3M Matte Graphite* with *Aeromotions* active rear wing (dual-element, 3-position adjustable) for 400kg of downforce at 160mph

Custom *Ginetta G55* roll cage by *Sparco* (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with *Schroth* 6-point harnesses and *Recaro* SPG XL seats (HANS-compatible), wrapped in *Alcantara* with *Sabelt* 3-inch lap belts for driver-specific fitment

Full *Forge Motorsport* carbon fiber engine cover and *Rally Armor* custom-molded urethane fender flares (clear-coated for UV resistance), paired with *OZ Racing* Ultraleggera HLT wheels (18x10.5 front, 18x12 rear) in *Gunmetal* finish with *Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2* tires (265/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear) for optimal heat cycling
